---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour on the platform
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Errors
If applicable, add screenshots or paste any error messages from the console.

## Environment
- Browser: (e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17)
- Device: (e.g. Desktop, iPhone 15)
- Page / Route: (e.g. `/platform-admin/users`, `/circles/:id`)
- User role / class: (e.g. member, class 5) — if relevant

## Severity
- [ ] Critical — platform unusable / data loss
- [ ] High — major feature broken
- [ ] Medium — feature partially broken, workaround exists
- [ ] Low — cosmetic / minor inconvenience

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
